data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signature on change orders.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Re-signature for change orders' as part of the signature capture functionality. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this specific functionality exists or is implemented in the system. The linked use case mentions the need for re-signature on change orders, but without concrete API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating this capability, the requirement cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of re-signature functionality for change orders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-signature functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the re-signature requirement.
